name: lon_default
Description: Default longitude as given in the configuration file is used (missing Lon in metadata)

name: pt_ref_invalid
Description: No effective pan/tilt is returned and the requested pan/tilt was used instead

name: bad_pointing
Description: Difference between requested and effective pan/tilt angle is >= 3°

name: outliers
Description: If the spectrally integrated signal of the scan is more than 3 sigma or more than 25\% (whichever is largest) removed from the mean; it is masked and will not be used when averaging the series. This process is repeated until convergence and applied to the measured (ir)radiances and to the darks.

name: L0_threshold
Description: Check if any of the spectral pixels are saturated; i.e. digital number DN>=64000

name: L0_discontinuity
Description: Check if there are missing values in the spectrum; or significant discontinuities (\Delta DN>10^4)

name: dark_masked
Description: If any of the darks have been masked by `outliers'; `L0_threshold'; and/or; `L0_discontinuity'

name: half_of_scans_masked
Description: Less than half of the scans for a series passed quality checks `bad_pointing'; `outliers'; `L0_threshold'; and; `L0_discontinuity'

name: not_enough_dark_scans
Description: Not enough valid dark scans for this series (# valid dark scans < n_valid_dark from the config file)

name: not_enough_rad_scans
Description: Not enough valid radiance scans for this series (# valid radiance scans < n_valid_rad from the config file)

name: not_enough_irr_scans
Description: Not enough valid irradiance scans for this series (# valid irradiance scans < n_valid_irr from the config file)

name: series_missing
Description: Check if there are any missing series (either not present or flagged by `not_enough_dark_scans'; `not_enough_irr_scans'; `not_enough_rad_scans' or `vza_irradiance')

name: vza_irradiance
Description: One of the irradiance measurements did not have theta_v=180° (within 2° tolerance) so has been masked

name: no_clear_sky_irradiance
Description: More than 10% of the wavelength bands have a difference of more than 50% with the clear-sky model

name: variable_irradiance
Description: More than 10\% difference between start and end E_d at 550~nm

name: half_of_unc_too_big
Description: More than 50\% of data has random error above 100% (likely corrupted or dark data)

name: single_irradiance_used
Description: If only one series of irradiance is used for the computation of the reflectance

name: no_clear_sky_sequence
Description: If all irradiance series are flagged with the `no_clear_sky_irradiance' flag
